eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Indiana; at 11:23 AM on AUG 6, 2019 Effective until 11:38 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A TEST OF THE INDIANA EAS SYSTEM. THIS TEST IS CONDUCTED IN COORDINATION WITH THE INDIANA BROADCASTERS AS A PUBLIC SERVICE TO THE CITIZENS OF INDIANA.
